content:
RORK FINAL DEPLOYMENT — CLOSE LAST 7 BLOCKERS NOW

Current status:
13/20 verified live.
7/20 still pending.
Do not create another audit. Finish and deploy.

TARGET:
All 20/20 production tasks must be live, deployed, verified, and backed by proof.

BLOCKERS TO CLOSE NOW:

14. Android Expo build clean
- Fix Android Expo build.
- Run build/checks.
- Verify Android opens app.
- Verify chat, members, capital network, login.

15. Native owner signin
- Verify owner signin on iOS and Android.
- Fix Supabase auth token flow.
- Verify ownerSessionPresent=true.
- Verify tokenPresent=true.
- Verify readyToRun=true.

16. Rork independence — AI provider chain
- Remove Rork as AI fallback.
- Use:
  1. IVX AI Gateway
  2. OpenAI direct
  3. Anthropic direct
- If AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY or OPENAI_API_KEY / ANTHROPIC_API_KEY missing, return exact missing env var only.

17. Rork independence — env vars / SDK
- Remove runtime dependency on:
  @rork-ai/toolkit-sdk
  withRorkMetro
  EXPO_PUBLIC_RORK_*
  RORK_TOOLKIT_SECRET_KEY
  toolkit.rork.com
  api.rork.com
- Keep rollback tag before removal.
- Verify no app crash.

18. Member system full profile
- One-click member profile must show:
  name, email, phone, zip, type, source, KYC, SMS/email status, wallet, investments, documents, audit history, admin actions.
- Use real DB only.

19. Investor CRM full fields
- Investor CRM must show:
  source, campaign, country, language, score, capital range, preferences, deals viewed, meetings, follow-ups, notes, documents, pipeline stage.
- No fake CRM records.

20. Enterprise data protection + login recovery
- Verify Data Vault.
- Verify soft delete.
- Verify snapshots.
- Verify restore center.
- Verify no hard deletes.
- Verify SMS/email owner recovery.
- Verify manual email/password login.

EXECUTE:
1. Fix code.
2. Run typecheck.
3. Run full test suite.
4. Run Android build.
5. Run iOS build.
6. Run Web build.
7. Run secret scan.
8. Push GitHub main.
9. Trigger Render deploy.
10. Verify production.

FINAL REPORT ONLY:

STATE:

RULE:
Do not mark VERIFIED until 20/20 tasks are deployed live.
If a credential is missing, list exact env var and runtime proof.
No fake proof. No narrative. No VERIFIED + BLOCKED contradiction.
